name: Reversi
short_description: Reversi - A Board Game of Strategy and Tactics!
detailed_description:
Reversi is a strategy board game for two players, played on an 8×8 uncheckered board. Players take turns placing disks on the board with their assigned color facing up. Any of the opponent's disks that are in a straight line and bounded by the disk just placed and another disk of the current player's color are flipped to the current player's color. The object of the game is to have the majority of disks displaying your color when the last playable empty square is filled.

Perfect for enjoying with family and friends, you can also challenge yourself against AI with five levels of difficulty. Be warned, overcoming the highest difficulty AI is a true challenge!

This game is extremely well-known in Japan as "Othello." While players who enjoy Othello might appreciate the strategic challenges of our Reversi app, please note that our product is independently developed and has no official connection to the Othello trademark.

Features:

Undo function

Board editor

Custom board sets and piece sets

Supports standard 8x8 as well as 6x6 and 10x10 board sizes.

Save/load unfinished game

AIs with five levels of difficulty

Custom background themes, avatars, and sounds

Timer-based games

You'll also gain experience points by winning against the AI (+1 for Easy, +3 for Medium, +5 for Hard, and +7 for Expert).

Download Reversi now and immerse yourself in a world of strategic gameplay, captivating graphics, and tactical challenges!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Turkish, Vietnamese
